electrical.note: 600V/5A ultrafast 40ns PFC boost diode. Used in PI DER-930 PFC boost stage. TO-220AC.
Fast recovery diode 1300V/2A. Used in PI DER-1025 RCD clamp.
150V/15A Schottky. Used in PI DER-930 secondary output rectifier.
